Title: Successful User Registration
Preconditions: User has an Android device with internet access
Test Data: Valid email (e.g., test@example.com), strong password (e.g., P@ssw0rd!), full name (e.g., John Doe)
Test Steps:
1. Open the ECO-DIGIFY app.
2. Navigate to the registration screen.
3. Enter valid email, password, and full name.
4. Confirm password.
5. Tap the "Register" button.
Expected Result: User account is created successfully, and the system redirects to the login screen with a confirmation message.

Title: Successful User Login
Preconditions: User has a registered account
Test Data: Registered email (e.g., test@example.com), correct password (e.g., P@ssw0rd!)
Test Steps:
1. Open the ECO-DIGIFY app.
2. Navigate to the login screen.
3. Enter registered email and correct password.
4. Tap the "Login" button.
Expected Result: User is logged in successfully, and the app displays the home screen or profile screen.

Title: Failed Login with Incorrect Password
Preconditions: User has a registered account
Test Data: Registered email (e.g., test@example.com), incorrect password (e.g., wrongpass)
Test Steps:
1. Open the ECO-DIGIFY app.
2. Navigate to the login screen.
3. Enter registered email and incorrect password.
4. Tap the "Login" button.
Expected Result: System displays an error message indicating incorrect credentials.

Title: Update User Profile Information
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Data: Updated full name (e.g., John Smith), updated email (e.g., john.smith@example.com)
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the app.
2. Navigate to the "Modifica Profilo" (Edit Profile) screen.
3. Enter updated name and email.
4. Tap the "Save" button.
Expected Result: Profile is updated successfully, and changes are reflected in the "Visualizza Profilo" screen.

Title: Successful User Registration
Preconditions: App installed on the device
Test Data: Valid name, surname, email, password, car brand, model, fuel type
Test Steps:
1. Open the app and select "Registrati"
2. Fill in the registration form with valid data
3. Submit the form
Expected Result: Account created in the database and user redirected to the login screen

Title: Registration with Missing Required Fields
Preconditions: App installed on the device
Test Data: Empty fields for name, surname, email, password, car brand, model, fuel type
Test Steps:
1. Open the app and select "Registrati"
2. Submit the form without filling any fields
Expected Result: Error message displayed for missing required fields

Title: Successful User Login
Preconditions: App installed on the device and user has an existing account
Test Steps:
1. Open the app and select "Login"
2. Enter valid email and password
3. Submit the form
Expected Result: User redirected to the main screen of the app

Title: Login with Invalid Credentials
Preconditions: App installed on the device and user has an existing account
Test Data: Valid registered email and incorrect password
Test Steps:
1. Open the app and select "Login"
2. Enter valid email and incorrect password
3. Submit the form
Expected Result: Error message displayed for invalid credentials

Title: Start Trip Calculation
Preconditions: User has an account and is logged in
Test Steps:
1. User presses the "Avvia Tragitto" button
2. GPS starts tracking the trip
Expected Result: Real-time km and CO2 calculation begins

Title: End Trip and Display Results
Preconditions: User has an account, is logged in, and has started a trip
Test Steps: 1. User presses the "Termina Tragitto" button
Expected Result: Display of consumed fuel and emitted CO2 for the trip

Title: View User Profile Information
Preconditions: User has an account and is logged in
Test Steps: 1. User selects the profile icon from the menu
Expected Result: Display of user’s registration data (name, surname, email, car details)

Title: Modify User Profile Information
Preconditions: User has an account and is logged in
Test Data: Updated name, surname, email, car brand, model, fuel type
Test Steps:
1. User selects the profile icon from the menu
2. User presses the "Modifica Profilo" button
3. User updates profile information
4. User submits the changes
Expected Result: Updated information displayed and saved in the database

Title: Successful User Logout
Preconditions: User has an account and is logged in
Test Steps:
1. User selects the profile icon from the menu
2. User presses the "ESCI" button
Expected Result: User redirected to the login/registration screen

Title: Real-Time CO2 Calculation During Trip
Preconditions: User has an account, is logged in, and has started a trip
Test Steps:
1. User presses the "Avvia Tragitto" button
2. User drives for a measurable distance
Expected Result: Real-time display of km traveled and CO2 emissions

Title: Display Trip Emission Report
Preconditions: User has an account, is logged in, and has completed a trip
Test Steps: 1. User presses the "Termina Tragitto" button
Expected Result: Display of a report showing distance traveled, CO2 emissions, and trip date

Title: CO2 Calculation Based on Vehicle Type
Preconditions: User has an account, is logged in, and has started a trip
Test Steps:
1. User registers with a specific vehicle type
2. User starts a trip
3. User drives for a measurable distance
Expected Result: CO2 emissions calculated based on the vehicle type and distance traveled

Title: View Trip History and Emissions
Preconditions: User has an account, is logged in, and has completed multiple trips
Test Steps: 1. User navigates to the trip history section
Expected Result: Display of all completed trips with associated CO2 emissions and dates

Title: Verify Minimum Storage Space for App Installation
Preconditions: Device with insufficient storage (<100MB free)
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to install the app on a device with 50MB free storage.
2. Observe the installation process and any error messages.
Expected Result: Installation fails with an error message indicating insufficient storage.

Title: Verify Battery Consumption During Emission Calculation
Preconditions: Device battery level > 50%
Test Steps:
1. Open the app and navigate to the emission calculation feature.
2. Perform a calculation for a predefined trip (e.g., 100km).
3. Monitor battery usage via device settings before and after the calculation.
Expected Result: Battery consumption remains within acceptable limits (no significant drain, e.g., <5% for the calculation).

Title: Verify Intuitiveness of App Interface
Preconditions: None
Test Data: New user with no prior app experience
Test Steps:
1. Launch the app for the first time.
2. Ask the user to perform a basic task (e.g., register, calculate emissions).
3. Observe user interactions and time taken to complete the task.
Expected Result: User completes the task within 2 minutes without assistance, indicating an intuitive interface.

Title: Verify App Compatibility with Android 8.0+
Preconditions: Android emulator or device with Android 8.0 installed
Test Steps:
1. Install the app on an Android 8.0 device/emulator.
2. Attempt to perform basic functions (e.g., login, emission calculation).
Expected Result: App installs and runs without errors on Android 8.0.

Title: Verify App Incompatibility with Android < 8.0
Preconditions: Android emulator or device with Android 7.1 installed
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to install the app on an Android 7.1 device/emulator.
2. Observe installation process and app behavior.
Expected Result: Installation fails or app crashes during launch with an error message indicating unsupported OS version.

Title: Verify Database Scalability for User Historical Data
Preconditions: Database populated with 10,000 user records
Test Steps:
1. Query the database for historical emission data of a specific user.
2. Measure response time for the query.
3. Add 5,000 more records and repeat the query.
Expected Result: Response time remains under 2 seconds for both queries, indicating scalability.

Title: Verify App Functionality Without Internet Connection
Preconditions: Device with active internet connection
Test Steps:
1. Disable internet connection on the device.
2. Attempt to perform an emission calculation or access historical data.
Expected Result: App displays an error message indicating the need for an internet connection and disables offline functionality.

Title: Verify App Functionality With Internet Connection
Preconditions: Device with active internet connection
Test Data: Valid user credentials and emission data
Test Steps:
1. Enable internet connection on the device.
2. Log in to the app and perform an emission calculation.
3. Verify access to historical data.
Expected Result: App functions normally, allowing calculations and data access without errors.
